creator: mark@kijo.co
text:
Good Afternoon, 

After viewing your http://freebsdwww.ludd.ltu.se/commercial/software.html page and clicking through some of the multiple software's featured. I found a few 404 errors. They are as follows; 

journyx WebTime - 404
PixInsight - 404
www.polyhedra.com - 404
SoftMaker Software GmbH - 404

We saw that one of our competitors - https://www.clicktime.com features on your site. We are looking at improving our backlink profile and we thought https://gocrono.com/ would be a suitable replacement for one of these 404's. 

Thank you for your time and look forward to hearing from you. 

Kind Regards 
Mark
